text: 9. General Contractor reserves the right to joint check material and equipment suppliers as well as any subsubcontractors of this Subcontractor, if deemed necessary from Contractor's reasonable assessment after review of Subcontractor's credit references or if the suppliers and/or sub-subcontractors give notification/reason to Contractor that Subcontractor is delinquent in or not paying bills due to Subcontractor's negligence.
